description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-text` (T3-12) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, variant typed (body/lead/small/caption/overline), weight typed, color typed
2. Accessibility — semantic element selection (p, span, strong, em) based on context, heading levels NOT handled here (use hx-heading), truncation provides full text via title or aria-label, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all variants, truncation, all semantic element types, color variants, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all variants with font size/weight/color controls
5. CSS — `--hx-*` typography tokens (font-size, line-height, letter-spacing), CSS parts (text)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-text — T3-12 antagonistic quality review

summary:
## Summary: Antagonistic quality review of `hx-text` (T3-12) ### Changes Implemented - Wrote `AUDIT.md` with 12 findings (1 P0, 5 P1, 6 P2) covering all 7 required audit areas: TypeScript, Accessibility, Tests, Storybook, CSS, Performance, Drupal ### Files Modified - `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text/AUDIT.md` (new file, 198 lines) ### Key Findings **P0:** - `P0-01`: Truncated text (`truncate` / `lines`) adds no `title` or `aria-label` — screen readers cannot access clipped content; healthcare impact on patient name/note truncation **P1:** - `P1-01`: No semantic element selection (`as` prop) — always renders `` with no mechanism for `

`, ``, `` - `P1-02`: `:host([lines])` CSS selector matches `lines="0"`, forcing `display:block` when no clamping is intended - `P1-03`: Variant set deviates from spec (`lead`/`small` missing; `body-sm`/`body-lg`/`label`/`label-sm`/`code` added) with no documentation - `P1-04`: No test verifying `-webkit-line-clamp` inline style is applied for `lines > 0` - `P1-05`: `inverse` color excluded from axe loop with no justification (only `disabled` is justified) **P2:** - Storybook `weight=""` leakage (should use `ifDefined`) - `code` variant untested in a11y loop without explanation - Non-prefixed `line-clamp` in styleMap is a browser no-op - No Drupal Twig integration docs - `WcText` type alias uses stale naming prefix ### Risks/Blockers Encountered - None — documentation-only task ### Learnings - The CSS `:host([attr])` selector pattern is a recurring footgun — it matches any presence of the attribute including `attr="0"` and `attr="false"`. Components must use `:host([attr]:not([attr="0"]))` or equivalent to avoid false positives. - Axe-core is insufficient as the sole accessibility test for truncation patterns. Full-text exposure requires explicit test assertions. ### Notes for Developer - The P0 truncation fix requires the component to track the full text content (e.g., via a getter on `textContent`) and apply it as `title` when `truncate` or `lines` is active. The `title` attribute would need to be set on the host element or exposed via `aria-label` on the inner span. ### Verification Status - This is an audit-only task (document findings, do not fix). No Playwright verification required. The AUDIT.md was committed and a PR was opened targeting `dev` (PR #333).
